features.name: scope resolution operator for nested type access
features.description: Code should include a scope resolution operator :: used to access a nested type, such as process::state for the state type within the process scope

features.name: parameterized class with multiple type parameters and defaults
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with two type parameters that have default values, used in OVM-style generic class hierarchies
features.snippet: class ovm_callbacks #(type T=int, CB=int) extends ovm_pool #(T,ovm_queue #(CB));

features.name: virtual function with typed parameters and default value
features.description: Code should include a virtual function inside a class with typed parameters and a default value for one parameter
features.snippet: virtual function void add_cb(T obj, CB cb, bit append=1);
